description: UBM goal-setting conversation, formatting, deterministic validation, and Daily.md embed update flow.

phases.title: Context and knowledge collection
phases.gate: required context sections emitted; missing external vault is reported as graceful zero-hit

consults.note: info-collector の Step 3 デュアルパス検索の追加経路。C06 knowledge-graph.json と C05 harness-artifact-graph.json を read-only 探索する。グラフ未生成時は skip し既存パスへフォールバック (graceful zero-hit)。

phases.title: Existing goal review
phases.condition: review mode or existing goal is present
phases.input: existing goal file and collected context
phases.gate: review summary is present or condition is not applicable

phases.title: Step 1-5 dialogue
phases.input: context summary, optional review summary, R1-R5 prompts
phases.gate: all five dialogue steps have concrete answers

phases.title: Template formatting
phases.output: Markdown file candidate in the 21-item hybrid structure
phases.gate: 15 content quality checks are satisfied before deterministic validation

phases.title: Deterministic validation
phases.gate: validate-goal-output.py exits 0 within 3 formatter repair attempts

phases.title: Daily.md embed update
phases.input: validated goal file path and UBM_VAULT_ROOT
phases.output: Daily.md embed line updated for the selected goal type
phases.gate: only the selected embed line is changed; non-vault or missing vault is reported without unrelated writes
